{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Elder construct
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Sleepless]] are currently inside an [[Elder construct]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c10">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
